title: Pan-Seared Salmon with Polish Salad
description: A simple and flavorful dish that combines the richness of pan-seared salmon with a refreshing Polish salad.
instructions: Season the salmon fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the crispy bacon to the skillet and cook until crispy.
Remove the bacon from the skillet and set aside.
Add the salmon fillets to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the salmon is cooking, prepare the Polish salad by combining the mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, and red onion in a bowl.
Drizzle the apple cider vinegar over the salad and toss to combine.
Serve the pan-seared salmon on top of the Polish salad, garnished with crispy bacon.
